description: Document-style infographic on a white background using black serif headings and bullet text, with NAEP (National Assessment of Educational Progress) horizontal stacked bar charts in shades of blue and gray. The top section, headed '12th Grade Math', states: 'Just 22% of 12th graders are proficient in math, meaning 78% are not proficient.' and 'In 2024, the average grade 12 mathematics score was the lowest it has been since the current assessment began in 2005.' Below is a chart titled 'Trend in twelfth-grade NAEP mathematics achievement-level results' with rows for years 2024, 2019, 2015, 2013, 2009, 2005, each segmented into 'Below NAEP Basic', 'NAEP Basic', and 'At or above NAEP Proficient' percentages (for example, 2024: 45 / 33 / 22). The lower section, headed '12th Grade Reading', states: '35% of 12th graders are proficient in reading, meaning 65% are not proficient.' and 'The average grade 12 reading score was lower in 2024 than in all previous assessments.', followed by a reading-results chart for years 2024, 2019, 2015, 1992.
notable_text: 12th Grade Math - Just 22% of 12th graders are proficient in math, meaning 78% are not proficient; 12th Grade Reading - 35% of 12th graders are proficient in reading, meaning 65% are not proficient
